turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Hi, this is Jamie from Microsoft support. We detected a serious issue on your computer.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: Oh, I didn't know anything was wrong.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Your computer is infected with a dangerous virus and it could leak your bank details.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: You must fix this immediately or your accounts may be frozen.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Buy a $200 gift card right now and read me the code so I can remove the virus.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: This is Agent Cooper from the Internal Revenue Service.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: Is there a problem with my taxes?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Yes, you owe back taxes and there is a lawsuit being filed against you.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: If you do not resolve this today, you may be arrested.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: You can avoid arrest by paying the balance now using prepaid vouchers.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: This is the fraud department from First National Bank.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: We noticed suspicious activity on your account and need to verify some details.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Please read me your full card number and the three digits on the back so we can secure your funds.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: Are you really from the bank?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Yes, I'm only trying to help you keep your money safe.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, this is NorthStar Shipping. I'm calling about a package scheduled for delivery tomorrow.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Oh great, what do you need from me?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We just need to confirm your preferred delivery window, morning or afternoon.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Afternoon works best.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect, you don't need to pay anything, it's already covered.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: I'm calling from Global Services to issue you a refund for an overcharge.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: A refund? I don't remember being overcharged.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: It was a small mistake on your computer maintenance plan, we just want to fix it for you.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: To process the refund, we need you to log into your online banking right now.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Once you're logged in, tell me your current balance so I can send the refund and make sure it posts correctly.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: I'm calling from Global Services to issue you a refund for an overcharge.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: A refund? I don't remember being overcharged.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: It was a small mistake on your computer maintenance plan, we just want to fix it for you.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: To process the refund, we need you to log into your online banking right now.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Once you're logged in, tell me your current balance so I can send the refund and make sure it posts correctly.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Hello, this is Express Parcel Services about a package that couldn't be delivered.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: Oh, I wasn't expecting anything, what is it?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: It's listed as an important document shipment requiring your signature.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: If you don't confirm today, the package will be returned to sender.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: Okay, what do I need to do?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: To release it, there is a small customs clearance fee, please pay now with a gift card code.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Hi, I'm Daniel from your internet provider's security team, how are you today?

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: I'm fine, is something wrong with my internet?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: We detected unusual traffic from your router that could indicate a hacker.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: If we don't resolve this, your connection may be suspended for security reasons.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: I really need my internet for work, what can we do?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Don't worry, I'm going to help you fix this right now.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: First, install a remote access tool so I can clean the problem.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: To activate the security license, please purchase a $300 network protection card and read me the code.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Grandma, it's me, I got into some trouble.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: Who is this? You sound scared.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: It's your grandson, I was in a car accident and they arrested me.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Please don't tell mom and dad, I only have one chance to fix this.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: The lawyer says if you send $4,000 in gift cards today, the charges will be dropped.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: This is the fraud monitoring team from Community Bank calling about a recent transaction.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, is something wrong?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We saw a $900 online purchase that looks unusual for your account.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For your security, please confirm only the last four digits of your card.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: It's 1234. I didn't make that purchase.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. We've blocked the charge and you will not be billed anything.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Congratulations! This is the International Lotto Commission, you've won a major prize.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: I don't remember entering any lottery.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Your phone number was selected from a global customer appreciation program.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: We must process your claim today or the prize will go to an alternate winner.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: To release the funds, you just need to pay a small processing fee via prepaid voucher.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: This is Maria calling from the IRS Taxpayer Assistance Center.

turns.speaker: taxpayer
turns.text: Oh, is there a problem?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No, we're following up about a refund that was mailed back as undeliverable.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We will resend it by check to the address you confirm in your online account. We do not take any payment over the phone.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: This is James from Premier Bank's security desk.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: Security desk? Did something happen?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: We detected someone trying to access your account from another country.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: If we don't verify now, your funds could be permanently frozen.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: That's scary. What do I need to verify?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Please read me your full card number, expiration date, and security code so I can secure your account.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, this is Alex from CityNet Internet Support.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hi, my connection keeps dropping today.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We are doing scheduled maintenance in your area, so you may experience brief interruptions.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: There's no extra charge on your account and you don't need to pay anything.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, thanks for letting me know.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Hi, this is Mark calling from the National Police Officers Relief Fund.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: Oh, that sounds important.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Our officers risk their lives daily, and we're raising emergency funds for injured families.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Can we count on you for a $200 donation right now using your card over the phone?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: I'm calling from Global Crypto Capital with a special opportunity.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: I'm not really an investor.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Many of our clients started just like you and doubled their savings.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: This is a limited-time program approved by our financial authority board.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: If you wait, you could miss out on thousands of dollars in gains.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: All you need is to transfer $1,000 today to lock in your slot.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good afternoon, this is Dr. Lee's office calling about your recent blood test.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Is something wrong?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The doctor would like to see you as soon as possible to discuss the results.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: There is no additional fee for this visit beyond your normal insurance.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Hi, this is the Federal Student Loan Forgiveness Center.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: I've been trying to lower my payments.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: You qualify for a special government program that can erase most of your debt.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: The deadline is today, after that you won't be eligible.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: That sounds good, how does it work?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: To enroll, we just need a one-time processing payment by card over the phone.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: This is the disconnect department from City Electric.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: Disconnect? I paid my bill last week.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Our system shows an outstanding balance, and your power is scheduled to be shut off in 30 minutes.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Once it's disconnected, it can take days to restore service.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: You can avoid shutoff by paying the balance now using prepaid cards.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hi, this is CourierPlus with a package for you that requires a small cash-on-delivery payment.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Okay, how much is it and what is it for?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It's $15, and it's from your online grocery order. You can also refuse it and we will return it at no cost.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: That's fine, I'll pay the driver when they arrive.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: I'm calling from Prime Support about a service you were charged for last year.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: I don't remember that service.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: We are closing our company and issuing refunds to all customers.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: You are actually eligible for a larger refund than you paid.

turns.speaker: victim
turns.text: Okay... what do you need from me?

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: Please open your online banking so we can transfer the funds.

turns.speaker: scammer
turns.text: To make sure the transfer completes, you must send back a verification amount using gift cards.
